blocks.content: Daisy looked up when she heard the bikes.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Jenkins.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Jones.
Kit did a slow circle in the parking lot. Riding away immediately would have been too obvious.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You almost killed Mrs. Dupont's azaleas.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: She saw that?

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Half the street saw that.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: The half that matters or the half that doesn't?

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: The half with eyes.
She gave him a look. The one that meant she was still deciding.
Savannah leaned over and said something in her ear. Daisy pressed her lips together.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: What.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Nothing.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: What did she say.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: She said the azaleas were probably fine.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: That is not what I said.
Eli had already pulled up and was inspecting the paper cup in Daisy's hand.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Is that the cherry slush? You got the cherry slush without me?

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: The Tasty Freeze is three blocks from here, Eli.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: And yet.
Daisy handed it over without being asked. Eli accepted it like this was his right.
Kit pulled his bike up alongside the wall.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: What are y'all doing today.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: We were going to the library.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You were not going to the library.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You don't know what I was going to do.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You were sitting here in the heat.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I was resting.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Between what and what.
Daisy looked at Savannah. Savannah looked at the sky.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Fine. What are you doing.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Old water tower.
Daisy turned back to him.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: No.
